Answer_original: SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Track.track_id = Performs.track_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(P.tracks_id) AS least3 FROM Artist A JOIN Performs P ON A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(P.tracks_id) >2 ORDER BY least3 DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(SELECT DISTINCT track_id FROM Track, Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id) AS total FROM Artist WHERE total > 2 ORDER BY total DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(T.*) FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND P.track_id = T.track_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(T.*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(T.*) DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT name, COUNT(track_id) AS Number_of_tracks FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(track_id) => 3 ORDER BY Number_of_tracks DESC ;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(T.track_id) AS count FROM Track T, Artist A, Preforms P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND P.track_id = T.track_id AND count > 2 GROUP BY A.name ORDER BY count DESC;

WITH DistinctTracks ( artist_id, track_id ) AS ( SELECT DISTINCT Artist.artist_id, track_id FROM Artist NATURAL JOIN Performs ) SELECT name, count(track_id) FROM Artist NATURAL JOIN DistinctTracks GROUP BY artist_id HAVING count(track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY count(track_id) DESC;

SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS Nr FROM Artist WHERE artist_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT track_id, artist_id FROM Track, Performs WHERE Track.track_id=Performs.track_id) GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY Nr DESC;

SELECT A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT T.track_id) FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id  = P.artist_id AND P.track_id = T.track_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T.track_id) DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, COUNT(Track.track_id) FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Track.track_id = Performs.track_id GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT A.name, COUNT(*) as ntracks FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND T.track_id = P.track_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(*) >=3 ORDER BY ntracks DESC;

SELECT a.name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.track_id) AS nr_of_tracks FROM Artist a JOIN Performs p ON a.artist_id = p.artist_id GROUP BY a.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY nr_of_tracks DESC, a.name;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY DESC;
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id)  AS num_tracks FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.artist_id num_tracks >= 3 ORDER BY num_tracks DESC;

Select A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) AS nr_of_tracks_with_performance From Artist A, Performs P Where A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY artist_id HAVING COUNT(nr_of_tracks_with_performance) >=3 ORDER BY nr_of_tracks_with_performance DESC
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id)  FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY name  HAVING COUNT(track_id) >= 3  ORDER BY COUNT(track_id) DESC;
SELECT A.name , COUNT(*) FROM Artist A, Track T WHERE T.album_id=A.album_id   GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(*)>=3;

SELECT A.name, Count(DISTINCT Performs.artist_id) AS played_by_artist FROM Artist A JOIN Performs P ON A.artist_id = P.artist_id  GROUP BY A.name  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.artist_id) >= 3 ORDER BY played_by_artist DESC;
SELECT name, DISTINCT COUNT(song) FROM Artist, Track WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id AND HAVING Track.song >= 3 ORDER BY Track.song DESC;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(Performs.track_id) FROM Performs, Artist WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id GROUP BY Performs.artist_id HAVING COUNT(Performs.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(Performs.track_id) DESC;
JOIN Track*Artist SELECT name AND track COUNT(*) FROM Track*Artist WHERE track COUNT(*) is MIN(3) GROUPING BY name ORDER BY DESC
SELECT name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist, Performs p GROUP BY p.artist_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3

SELECT a.name, COUNT(t.track_id) AS number_of_tracks FROM Artist a  INNER JOIN Performs p ON a.artist_id= p.artist_id INNER JOIN Track t ON t.Album_id=al.Album_id INNER JOIN Album al ON t.Album_id= al.Album_id INNER JOIN Release r ON r.Album_id= al.Album_id GROUP by a.name ORDER by release_date DESC
SELECT name, COUNT DISTINCT(track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND COUNT DISTINCT(track_id) >= 3 GROUP BY name ORDER BY COUNT DISTINCT(track_id) DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) AS total FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING total >= 3 ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) as num_tracks FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND P.track_id = (SELECT DISTINCT track_id FROM Performs) GROUP BY artist_id HAVING COUNT(track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY num_tracks DESC;

SELECT name, COUNT DISTINCT(track_id) FROM Track T, Performs P, Artist A WHERE T.track_id = P.track_id AND A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT DISTINCT(track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT DISTINCT(track_id) DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, SUM(Track.song) FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND SUM(Performs.track_id) >= 3 GROUP BY Performs.artist_id ORDER BY DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(*) as count FROM Artist, Performs, Track WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id GROUP BY name HAVING count >= 3 ORDER BY count DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(Performs.track_id) AS total_tracks FROM Artist, Performs  WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING total_tracks >= 3 ORDER BY total_tracks DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT A.name, COUNT(T.track_id) FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND P.track_id = T.track_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(T.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(T.track_id) DESC;

SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT, track_id) AS nr FROM Track, Performs, Artist  WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING nr >= 3 ORDER BY nr DESC;

SELECT a.name AS artist_name, COUNT( t.track_id) AS track_count FROM Track t, Artist a, Performs p WHERE t.track_id = p.track_id AND p.artist_id = a.artist_id GROUP BY p.artist_id HAVING COUNT (DISTINCT t.track_id > 3) ORDER BY track_count DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, COUNT(Performs.track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id=Performs.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.name;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(Track.track_id) AS total FROM Track, Artist, Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND total >= 3 GROUP BY Artist.name ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, COUNT(Track.track_id) FROM Track, Artist, Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND Artist.artist_id = Performs.track_id AND COUNT( Track.track_id) > 2 GROUP BY COUNT(Track.track_id);
SELECT DISTINCT name, COUNT(track_id) as count FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id AND count >= 3 ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Track.track_id) AS track_count FROM Artist JOIN Performs ON Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id JOIN Track ON Track.track_id = Performs.track_id GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Track.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY DESC

SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) AS distinct_tracks FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY distinct_tracks DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) FROM Artist NATURAL JOIN Performs GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) DESC;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(*) AS count_tracks FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Track.track_id = Performs.track_id GROUP BY Artist.artist_id HAVING count_tracks >= 3 ORDER BY count_tracks DESC;

SELECT artist_id FROM Performs WHERE COUNT(track_id) >= 3; SELECT name FROM Artist WHERE artist_id = artist_id.Performs; SELECT DINSTINCT COUNT(track_id) FROM Performs WHERE artist_id = artist_id.Performs;

SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT(Track.track_id)) AS distinct_tracks FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Track.track_id = Performs.track_id GROUP BY name HAVING distinct_tracks >= 3 ORDER BY distinct_tracks DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(P.track_id) FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id=P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(P.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(P.track_id) DESC;

WITH Activeartist AS ( SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT track.id) AS track_count FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Perfroms.track_id = Track.track_id GROUP BY name HAVING track_count >= 3 )   SELECT name, track_count FROM Activeartist ORDER BY track_count DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist A WHERE A.artist_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT P.artist_id FROM Performs P WHERE P.artist_id = A.artist_id );
SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(track_id) DESC;
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(*) FROM Artists WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Artists, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id=Performs.artist_id) >=3 GROUP BY Artist.name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id=Performs.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT track_id)>=3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT track_id);
SELECT A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) AS no_tracks FROM Artist A JOIN Performs P ON A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING no_tracks >= 3 ORDER BY no_tracks DESC;
SELECT Artist.name FROM Artist JOIN Track ON  GROUP BY Tracks HAVING COUNT () >= 3 SORT BY tracks DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(*) FROM Track, Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND 3 >= COUNT(*) GROUP BY artist_id ORDER BY COUNT(tracks) DESC;
SELECT A.name, DISTINCT COUNT(track_id) AS nr_tracks FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name   HAVING nr_tracks >= 3 ORDER BY nr_tracks DESC ;
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) as nr_of_tracks_played FROM Artist JOIN Performs on Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY artist_id HAVING COUNT(track_id) >=3 ORDER BY DESC;
SELECT a.name, COUNT(p.track_id) AS dist_t FROM Artist a, Performs p WHERE a.artist_id = p.artist_id GROUP BY a.name HAVING COUNT(p.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY dist_t DESC;

select name, COUNT(*) as n_tracks from Track T, Performs P, Artist A where T.track_id = P.track_id and A.artist_id = P.artist_id group by A.artist_id, T.track_id, P.role having COUNT(*) > 2 order by n_tracks desc;

SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS num_of_tracks FROM Artist a, Track t, Performs p WHERE t.track_id = p.track_id AND p.artist_id = a.artist_id GROUP BY name, t.track_id HAVING num_of_tracks >= 3 ORDER BY num_of_tracks DESC;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(Performs.track_id) AS tot_track FROM Artist JOIN Performs ON Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.name, Performs.tack_id HAVING tot_track > 2 ORDER BY DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT name, COUNT(*)  FROM Artist NATURAL JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT artist_id, track_id FROM Performs) GROUP BY name  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

SELECT A1.name AS artist_name, COUNT(T.track_id) AS total_tracks FROM Performs P, Artist A1, Album A2, Track T WHERE P.artist_id = A1.artist_id AND P.album_id = A2.album_id AND P.track_id = T.track_id AND total_tracks >= 3 GROUP BY artist_name ORDER BY total_tracks DESC;

SELECT A.name, DISTINCT COUNT(P.track_id) AS amount_of_tracks FROM Artist AS A, Performs AS P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUPY BY A.name HAVING amount_of_tracks >= 3 ORDER BY amount_of_tracks DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id GROUP BY Artist.artist_id HAVIN COUNT(*) >=3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(*) AS track_nr FROM Artist A, Performs P, Track T WHERE A.artist_id=P.artist_id AND T.track_id=P.track_id  GROUP BY A.name HAVING track_nr>=3 ORDER BY track_nr DESC;

SELECT  a.name, (SELECT count(p.artist_id)  from track as t, perfrom as p  where t.track_id=p.track_id GROUP BY  t.track_id ) as distict_tracks   FROM Performs as p, Track as t, Artist as a WHERE  p.artist=a.artist_id AND p.track_id=t.track_id AND distict_tracks>=3 ORDER BY distict_tracks DESC;
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(*) AS Trackcounter FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY Arist.name HAVING Trackcounter >= 3 ORDER BY Trackcounter DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE P.artist_id = A.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY DESC;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(SELECT DISTINCT Performs.track_id FROM Performs WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id) FROM Artist WHERE COUNT(SELECT DISTINCT Performs.track_id FROM Performs WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(SELECT DISTINCT Performs.track_id FROM Performs WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id);
SELECT   a.name,   COUNT(DISTINCT(t.track_id)) FROM Track t, Artist a, Performs p WHERE t.track_id = p.track_id AND a.artist_id = p.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT(t.track_id)) >= 3;

SELECT A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT T.track_id) AS nr_tracks  FROM Artist A JOIN Performs P ON A.artist_id = P.artist_id JOIN Track T ON P.track_id = T.track_id GROUP BY A.artist_id, A.name HAVING COUNT (DISTINCT T.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY nr_tracks DESC;

SELECT A.name COUNT(DISTINCT T.track_id) FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND P.track_id = T.track_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING (COUNT (DISTINCT T.track_id) >= 3) ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T.track_id) DESC ;
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) FROM Artist, Peforms WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND track_id >= 3;
SELECT A.name, COUNT (*) AS total_tracks FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(*)>=3 ORDER BY total_tracks DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT name, COUNT(track_id) AS total_tracks, release_date FROM Artist, Track, Release WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = total_tracks AND total_tracks >= 3 AND Track.album_id = Release.album_id AND Release.release_date DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) AS nr_of_tracks_played FROM Performs P, Artist A GROUP BY P.artist_id, A.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY nr_of_tracks_played DESC;

SELECT a.name, COUNT(DISTINCT t.track_id) FROM Artist a, Track t, Performs p WHERE a.artist_id = p.artist_id AND t.track_id = p.track_id GROUP BY a.name HAVING COUNT (DISTINCT t.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT (DISTINCT t.track_id) DESC;

SELECT Ar.name, COUNT(T.track_id) AS number_of_tracks FROM Track T, Artist Ar, Performs P WHERE T.track_id = P.track_id AND P.artist_id = Ar.artist_id GROUP BY Ar.name HAVING COUNT(T.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY number_of_tracks DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT name, COUNT(*) AS nr_of_tracks FROM Artist JOIN Performs ON Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id  WHERE (Performs.role IS NOT NULL) HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY nr_of_tracks DESC

SELECT Artist.name, SUM(Performs.track_id) FROM Artist, Performs, WHERE EXISTS(  SELECT Performs.artist_id, SUM(Performs.track_id) FROM Performs WHERE SUM(Performs.track_id) >=3 GROUP BY Performs.artist_id ) GROUP BY Artist.name ;

SELECT name, COUNT(Track.track_id) as TracksPlayed FROM Artist JOIN Performs ON Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id JOIN Track ON Track.track_id = Performs.track_id WHERE TracksPlayed >= 3 ORDER BY TracksPlayed DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(name) FROM Artist A, Performs P  WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id  AND COUNT(name) >= 3 GROUP BY name  ORDER BY COUNT(name) DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) as nmbr_tracks FROM Artist WHERE nmbr_tracks => 3 GROUP BY artist_id ORDER BY nmbr_tracks DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(distinct) AS nr_distinct_tracks

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(*)  FROM Artist, Performs, Performs AS P2 WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.artist_id <>  P2.artist_id AND P2.track_id = Performs.track_id GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*)  DESC;
SELECT name, count FROM (   SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) AS count   FROM Artist A, Performs P   WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id   GROUP BY name ) WHERE count >= 3 ORDER BY count DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) desc;

SELECT name, COUNT(song) FROM Artist, Performs, Track WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(song) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(song) DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, COUNT(Performs.track_id) FROM Artist, Performs, Release WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND COUNT(Performs.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY release_date DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) FROM Performs, Artist WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id GROUP BY name  HAVING COUNT(track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(track_id) DESC;

SELECT A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT T.track_id) AS distinct_tracks FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P WHERE P.artist_id=A.artist_id AND P.track_id=T.track_id GROUP BY MAX(distinct_tracks) HAVING COUNT(T.track_id)>=3;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) > 2 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT COUNT (track_id) AS num_tracks, name FROM Track JOIN Performs ON Performs.track_id = Track.track_id GROUP BY name ORDER BY num_tracks DESC HAVING (Track.track_id) >= 3 ;

SELECT a.name AS artist_name, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) AS nr_tracks FROM Artist a JOIN Performs p ON a.artist_id=p.artist_id JOIN Tracks t ON p.track_id=t.track_id GROUP BY artist_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.track_id)>=3 ORDER BY nr_tracks;
SELECT a.name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.track_id) FROM Album a NATURAL JOIN Performs p GROUP BY a.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT p.track_id) DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT COUNT (track_id), name FROM Track, Artist  WHERE COUNT (*) >= 3 GROUP BY MAX(COUNT)
SELECT A.name, COUNT(P.track_id) AS count FROM Album A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id ORDER BY count DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) FROM Artist NATURAL JOIN Performs GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, COUNT(Track.track_id) AS distinct_tracks FROM Artist, Performs, Track WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.name ORDER BY distinct_track DESC;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND 3 >= (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id);
SELECT name, COUNT(*) FROM Performs, Artist WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id GROUP BY artist_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ORDER BY total DESC

SELECT a.name, COUNT(DISTINCT t.track_id) FROM Artist a, Track t, Performs p WHERE p.artist_id = a.artist_id AND p.track_id = t.track_id GROUP BY a.name, COUNT(DISTINCT t.track_id) HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT t.track_id) DESC;

SELECT A.name, COUNT (T.track_id) FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id= P.artist_id AND P.track_id T.rack_id AND (COUNT (T.track_id) >=3) GROUP BY A.name ORDER BY (COUNT (T.track_id)) DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(P.track_id) AS tracks FROM Artitst AS A, Perfroms AS P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id And tracks >= 3 ORDER BY tracks DESC;

SELECT name, count(DISTINCT track_id) FROM Track, Performs, Artist WHERE Performs.artist_id=Artist.artist_id AND Track.track_id=Performs.track_id HAVING count(DISTINCT track_id)>=3 ORDER BY count(DISTINCT track_id);
SELECT A.name, COUNT(P.track_id) FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(P.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(P.track_id) DESC
SELECT A.name, COUNT(P.track_id)>2 AS number FROM Artist A JOIN Performs P ON A.artist_id=P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name ORDER BY number DESC;
SELECT name, SUM(track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY SUM(track_id) HAVING name ORDER BY SUM(track_id) DESC;

SELECT DINSTINCT A.name, COUNT(*) AS numberDistinctTracks FROM Artist A, Performs P, Track T WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id  AND P.track_id = T.track_id  GROUP BY A.artist_id,  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT name, SUM(track_id) FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id=P.artist_id GROUP BY P.artist_id HAVING SUM(track_id)>=3 ORDER BY SUM(track_id) DESC;
SELECT name, total_tracks COUNT(track_id) FROM Artist, Performs, Track Where Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Track.track_id = Performs.track_id SORT BY total_tracks;
SELECT A.name FROM Artist A WHERE (SELECT  P.track_id FROM Performs WHERE )
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id) FROM Artist JOIN Performs ON Artist.artist_id=Performs.artist_id GROUP BY Performs.artist_id HAVING COUNT(Performs.track_id) >= 3;
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(Track.track_id) AS number FROM Artist, Track GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(Track.track_id)>=3 ORDER BY number DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(P.track) as distinctTracks FROM Artist A, Performs P GROUP BY P.artist_id HAVING COUNT(P.track) >= 3  ORDER BY COUNT(P.track) DESC ;
SELECT name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist, Performs, Track WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id; GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) FROM Artist, (SELECT DISTINCT track_id FROM Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id) GROUP BY name ORDER BY COUNT(track_id) DESC;
select A.name, count(*) as total_tracks from Artist A, Track T, Performs P where A.artist_id=P.artist_id and P.track_id=T.track_id group by A.name having count(*)>=3 order by count(*) desc;
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) AS total FROM Artist NATURAL JOIN Performs GROUP BY name HAVING total >= 3 ORDER BY total DESC
SELECT a.name, COUNT (p.track_id) FROM Artist a, Performs p, Track t WHERE a.artist_id = p.artist_id AND t.track_id = p.track_id AND COUNT (p.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(p.track_id) DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND P.track_id = T.track_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) desc;

SELECT A.name, COUNT(*) AS distinct_track_count FROM Artist A WHERE 0 <>  ( SELECT COUNT(P.role) FROM Performs P, Track T WHERE P.artist_id = A.artist_id AND T.track_id = P.track_id ) GROUP BY A.name HAVING distinct_track_count >= 3 ORDER BY distinct_track_count DESC;
SELECT name,COUNT(Performs.track_id) FROM Artist,Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(Performs.track_id) >=3 ORDER BY COUNT(Performs.track_id) DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(P.track_id) FROM Artist A JOIN Performs P ON A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.artist_id HAVING COUNT(P.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(P.track_id);
SELECT A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT) FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT) > 2 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT) DESC;
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT( Performs.track_id) FROM Artist, Performs JOIN Performs ON Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY Performs.artist_id HAVING COUNT(Performs.track_id) >= 3;

SELECT name, COUNT(Track.track_id) FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id AND Track.track_id = Performs.track_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(Track.track_id) > 2 ORDER BY COUNT(Track.track_id) DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT (DISTINCT T.track) AS num_dist_tracks FROM Artist A NATURAL JOIN Track T GROUP BY A.name HAVING (num_dist_tracks >= 3) ORDER BY num_dist_tracks DESC;

SELECT name, DISTINCT COUNT(Artist.artist_id) FROM Artist,Performs,Track WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Track.track_id = Performs.track_id HAVING (COUNT(Artist.artist_id) >=3) GROUP BY name ORDER BY COUNT(Artist.artist_id) DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT A.name, A.COUNT(song) FROM Artist A JOIN Performs P ON A.artist_id = P.artist_id JOIN Track T ON P.track_id = T.track_id GROUP BY artist_id HAVING (COUNT(song) >= 3) ORDER BY A.COUNT(song);
SELECT DISTINCT name, COUNT (*) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id ORDER BY COUNT (*) DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT (DISTINCT P.track_id) FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id;
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id) AS track_no FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND track_no >= 3 ORDER BY track_no DESC;
SELECT name, Count(track_id) FROM Performs, Artist WHERE Performs.artist_id=Artist.artist_id AND Count(track_id)>=3 ORDER BY Count(track_id);
SELECT COUNT (track_id) AS TrackCount FROM Artist , Perform GROUP BY TrackCount HAVING COUNT (track_id) > = 3 ORDER BY TrackCount ;
SELECT name, track_id FROM Performs GROUP BY artist_id HAVING COUNT > 2 ORDER BY COUNT;
SELECT DISTINCT name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist A WHERE 3<= ( SELECT COUNT(track_id) FROM Performs P WHERE A.artist_id =P.artist_id ) GROUP BY COUNT(*) DESC;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Track.song) FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id  GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Track.song) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT name, COUNT(track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Count(track_id) > 3 ORDER BY COUNT(track_id) DESC;

SELECT Artist.name,COUNT(Track.track_id) FROM Artist WHERE Artist.artist_id=Performs.artist_id AND Performs Performs.track_id=Track.track_id AND COUNT(Track.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(Track.track_id) DESC;
SELECT a.name, COUNT(t.track_id) AS number of distinct tracks FROM Artist a,  Track t WHERE number of distinct tracks > 2 GROUP BY number of distinct tracks DECR;

SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, COUNT(*) AS PlayedTracks FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id  AND PlayedTracks >= 3  GROUP BY Artist.name ORDER BY PlayedTracks;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(P.track_id) AS noTracks FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(P.track_id) > 2 ORDER BY noTracks DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT DISTINCT(*) AS num_tracks FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND P.track_id = T.track_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING  num_tracks >= 3;
SELECT A.name , COUNT (DISTINCT P.track_id) AS number_tracks FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist _id GROUP BY A.name HAVING number_tracks >= 3 ORDER BY number_tracks DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(P.track_id), A.name FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id=P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(P.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(P.track_id) DESC;

SELECT name, COUNT(Track.track_id) FROM Track, Artist, Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING (COUNT(Track.track_id) >= 3) ORDER BY COUNT(Track.track_id) DESC ;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) >= 3  ORDER BY DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) AS num FROM Artist A NATURAL JOIN Performs P WHERE num>2 GROUP BY name ORDER BY num DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(*) as played FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Arist.artist_id == Performs.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING played >= 3 ORDER BY desc;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(*) AS total FROM Artist A, Track T, Album Al WHERE A.artist_id = Al.artist_id AND T.album_id = Al.album_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(Performs.track_id)  FROM Artist, Performs  WHERE Performs.artist_id=Artist.artist_id  GROUP BY Artist.name  HAVING COUNT(Performs.track_id) >= 3  ORDER BY DESC COUNT(Performs.track_id);
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist JOIN Performs ON Performs.artist_id=Artist.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.artist_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) AS no_tracks FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY P.artist_id HAVING no_tracks >=3 ORDER BY no_tracks DESC;
SELECT A.name, count(P.track_id) AS total FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(P.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id) AS no_of_tracks FROM Artist,Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id=Performs.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.artist_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY no_of_tracks DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT a.name, COUNT(*) AS total FROM Artist AS a, Performs AS p WHERE a.artist_id = p.artist_id GROUP BY a.name HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ORDER BY total DESC;
SELECT a.name, COUNT(p.track_id) FROM Artist a JOIN Performs p WHERE artist_id IN (SELECT COUNT(track_id)>=3 FROM Performs));
SELECT name, COUNT DISTINCT (track_id) AS total_tracks_performed FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id HAVING COUNT (track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY total_tracks_performed DESC

SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) AS tracks  FROM Aritst WHERE EXISTS( SELECT track_id FROM Performs, Track WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id) GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(tracks) >= 3 ORDER BY tracks DESC ;
SELECT name, count(*)  FROM artist, performs  WHERE artist.artist_id = performs.artist_id GROUP BY name  HAVING count(*) >= 3  ORDER BY count(*) desc;
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE COUNT(track_id) > 3 AND Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY name ORDER BY COUNT(track_id) DESC
SELECT name,COUNT(track_id) FROM Artist NATURAL JOIN Performs HAVING COUNT(track_id)>3 GROUP BY name ORDER BY DESC;

SELECT artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT track.track_id) FROM artist, performs WHERE artist.artist_id = performs.artist_id GROUP BY artist.name HAVING COUNT(track.track_id) >= '3' ORDER BY (COUNT(track.track_id)) DESC;
SELECT A.artist_id, A.name, COUNT(P.artist_id)    -- multiple artists can have same name, so select artist_id as well FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.artist_id;

SELECT name,COUNT(Performs.track_id) FROM Track,Artist,Performs,Release WHERE Track.track_id=Performs.track_id AND Artist.artist_id=Performs.artist_id AND Track.album_id=Release.album_id  GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(Perfoms.track_id)>=3 ORDER BY release_date DESC;

SELECT name, COUNT(Track.track_id) AS distinct_tracks FROM Artist, Performs, Track WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id GROUP BY name HAVING distinct_tracks >= 3 ORDER BY distinct_tracks DESC;

CREATE VIEW tracks_per_artist AS SELECT A.artist_id, P.name, COUNT(P.track_id) AS track_count FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.artist_id;  SELECT * FROM tracks_per_artist WHERE trak_count > 2 ORDER BY track_count

SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, COUNT (Track.song) FROM Artist, Track WHERE(   SELECT Artist.artist_id   FROM Artist   WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id   HAVING COUNT (Track.track_id) >= 3);
select a.name, count(t.track_id) as c from Track t, Performs p, Artist a where t.track_id=p.track_id and p.artist_id=a.artist_id group by a.name having c>=3 order by c desc;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Track.track_id) as no_of_tracks FROM Artist JOIN Performs ON Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id JOIN Track ON Track.track_id = Performs.track_id GROUP BY Artist.name, Track.track_id HAVING no_of_tracks >= 3 ORDER BY no_of_tracks DESC;
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(Track.track_id) FROM Artist, Track GROUP BY artist_id, Artist.name HAVING COUNT(Track.track_id) > 2 ORDER BY COUNT(Track.track_id) DESC;
SELECT name, song FROM Artist, Track WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Track.track_id = Performs.track_id GROUP BY Track.song WHERE song >= 3 ORDER BY DESC;

SELECT a.name, COUNT(t.track_id) FROM Artists a LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT p.artist_id,p.track_id FROM Performs p) t  ON (t.artist_id = a.artist_id) GROUP BY t.artist_id ORDER BY COUNT(t.track_id) DESC;
CREATE VIEW count AS SELECT COUNT(artist_id) FROM Performs WHERE NOT track_id= track_id;  SELECT Artist.name, Performs.count FROM Artist, Performs WHERE count>=3;
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(Performs.artist_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id=Performs.artist_id AND COUNT(Performs.artist_id) >= 3  ORDER BY COUNT (Performs.artist_id) DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT A.name, SUM(P.track_id) FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY DESC;

SELECT name, COUNT(Track.track_id) FROM Track, Artist, Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id  GROUP BY name Having COUNT(Track.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(Track.track_id) DESC;
SELECT Ar.name, SUM(*) FROM Artist Ar, Track T, Album Al WHERE T.album_id = Al.album_id AND Al.artist_id = Ar.artist_id GROUP BY Ar.name
SELECT name, COUNT(Performs.artist_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id=Performs.artist_id AND COUNT(Performs.artist_id)>2 GROUP BY Performs.artist_id ORDER BY COUNT(Performs.artist_id);
SELECT name, COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT (name, track_id) FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id=P.artist_id ) GROUP BY name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) AS co FROM Performs NATURAL JOIN Artist  GROUP BY name HAVING co>=3 ORDER BY co DESC;

SELECT  Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id) FROM Artist. Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id) >= 3 GROUP BY Artist.name ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id) DESC;
SELECT a.name, COUNT(*) AS trackNumber FROM Artist a, Track t, Performs p WHERE a.artist_id = p.artist_id  AND p.track_id = t.track_id GROUP BY a.name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY trackNumber DESC ;
SELECT name, COUNT(p.track_id) AS Count FROM Artist a  LEFT JOIN Performs p ON a.artist_id = p.artist_id  GROUP BY a.artist_id, p.track_id HAVING COUNT(artist_id > 3) ORDER BY Count desc LIMIT 5;

SELECT A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) FROM Artist AS A, Performs AS P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) DESC;

SELECT A.name, COUNT(T.track_id) FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P, Release R WHERE T.track_id=P.track_id AND P.artist_id=A.artist_id AND R.album_id=T.album_id HAVING COUNT(T.track_id)>=3 ORDER BY R.release_date DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(P.track_id) AS counter FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id=P.artist_id AND counter>2 GROUP BY counter DESC
SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) FROM Artist, Performs  WHERE COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) DESC;

SELECT A.name AS name, COUNT(P.track_id) AS distinct_tracks_played FROM Artist A, Performs P, Release R WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id AND distinct_tracks_played >= 3 AND R.album_id = T.album_id ORDER BY R.release_date DESC;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist, (SELECT DISTINCT artist_id, track_id FROM Performs) AS Pair WHERE Artist.artist_id = Pair.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*)  DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) FROM Performs GROUP BY artist_id HAVING COUNT(track_id)>=3 ORDER BY COUNT(track_id) DESC;

select Artist.name, Count(distinct Track.track_id) as played from Artist join Performs on Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id  join Track on Track.track_id = Performs.track_id  group by Artist.name  having played >= 3  order by desc
SELECT DISTINCT A.name, COUNT(T.track_id) FROM Track T, Artist A, Performs P WHERE P.artist_id = A.artist_id AND T.track_id = P.track_id HAVING COUNT(T.track_id) >= 3  LIMIT 5 ;
SELECT name, COUNT(artist_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE COUNT(Performs.artist_id) >= 3 ORDER BY name;
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(Prefroms.artist_id) FROM Artist, Preforms  WHERE DISTINCT Preforms.track_id AND COUNT => 3 ASC ;

SELECT A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) FROM Artist A INNER JOIN Performs P ON A.artist_id = P.artist_id WHERE P.role IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) DESC;

select distinct Artist.name, count(Track) from Artist JOIN Performs on Artist.artist_id=Performs.artist_id JOIN on Track on Performs.track_id=Track.Track_id  JOIN Release on Release.album_id=track.album_id order by Release.release_date desc
SELECT A.name, COUNT(*) AS distinct_tracks FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id=P.artist_id  GROUP BY A.name HAVING distinct_tracks >= 3 ORDER BY A.birth_date DESC;

SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) FROM Artist, Performs  WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id  AND track_id IN(SELECT DISTINCT track_id FROM Performs) GROUP BY name  HAVING COUNT(track_id) >=3 ORDER BY COUNT(track_id) DESC;
SELECT artist_id ,  name, track_id FROM Track, Artist  WHERE artist_id <= 3 track_id
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) AS total  FROM Artist A, Performs P  GROUP BY A.name HAVING A.artist_id = P.artist_id  AND COUNT(track_id) >= 3  ORDER BY total DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist NATURAL JOIN Performs GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3;
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(Performs.track) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(Performs.track) > 3 ORDER BY COUNT(Performs.track) DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, SUM(Performs.track_id) FROM Artist, Performs, Performs AS Performs2, Performs AS Performs3 WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.artist_id = Performs2.artist_id AND Performs2.artist_id = Performs3.artist_id AND NOT Performs.track_id = Performs2.track_id AND NOT Performs2.track_id = Performs3.track_id ORDER BY SUM(Performs.track_id) DESC;

WITH ArtistAndPlayCount (artist_id, count) AS (  WITH PerformsModRole (artist_id, track_id) AS (   SELECT DISTINCT artist_id, track_id FROM Performs   )   SELECT artist_id, COUNT(*) AS count   FROM PerformsModRole   GROUP BY artist_id  ) SELECT Artist.name, ArtistAndPlayCount.count FROM ArtistAndPlayCount, Artist WHERE ArtistAndPlayCount.artist_id = Artist.artist_id AND ArtistAndPlayCount.count >= 3 ORDER BY ArtistAndPlayCount.count DESC; -- I sooo hope nested with as statements are legal...

SELECT name, COUNT(Track.track_id) FROM Track, Performs, Artist WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id AND Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(Track.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(Track.track_id) DESC;
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(*) AS amount FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY amount DESC
SELECT name, COUNT(track_id) FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id=P.artist_id HAVING COUNT(track_id)>=3 GROUP BY name ORDER BY COUNT(track_id) DESC;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(Track) AS NumberOfTracks FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING SUM(NumberOfTracks) >= 3 ORDER BY NumberOfTracks DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(role) FROM Artist JOIN Performs ON Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id WHERE role > 3 ORDER BY COUNT(role);

SELECT DISTINCT name FROM Artist A, Release R, Track T WHERE A.artist_id IN (   SELECT artist_id   FROM Artist A   WHERE (SELECT track_id   FROM Track   HAVING COUNT(*)  >= 3   )   ) INTERSECTION (   SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(track_id)   FROM Artist A, Track T   ) AND ORDER BY COUNT(track_id);
select distinct name, count(track_id) from Artist, Performs where Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id  group by name having count(track_id) >= 3 order count(track_id) by desc;
SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) AS no_tracks FROM Performs GROUP BY name HAVING no_tracks>=3;
SELECT Artist.name,  COUNT(Track.track_id) FROM Artist, Track, Album WHERE Album.album_id = Track.album_id AND Artist.artist_id = Track.artist_id AND COUNT(Track.track_id) >= 3 LIMIT 1;
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(Track.track_id) FROM Track, Artist, Performs GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(Track.track_id)>=3 ORDER BY COUNT(Track.track_id) DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(T.track_id) > 3 FROM Artist A, Track T JOIN Performs P ON A.artist_id = P.artist_id WHERE T.track_id = P.track_id ORDER BY COUNT(T.track_id) DESC;
SELECT name, count(Performs.track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id AND count(Performs.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY count(Performs.track_id)
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(Performs.track_id) FROM Artist NATURAL JOIN Performs WHERE COUNT(Performs.track_id) > 2 GROUP BY Artist.name ORDER BY COUNT(Performs.track_id) DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE P.artist_id = A.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

SELECT Artist.name,COUNT(Performs.artist_id) FROM Artist,Performs WHERE COUNT(Performs.artist_id)>=3 AND ( SELECT DISTINCT Performs.artist_id,Performs.track_id FROM Performs) GROUP BY Artist.name ORDER BY MAX(COUNT(Performs.artist_id));

SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, COUNT(Track.track_id) AS number FROM Artist, Track, Performs WHERE Performs.artist_id=Artist.artist_id AND Performs.track_id=Track.track_id AND number>=3 ORDER BY number DESC;
SELECT  name, SUM(DISTINCT track_id)  FROM Performs P, Artist A  WHERE P.artist_id = A.artist_id AND SUM(DISTINCT track_id) > 2 ORDER BY(DISTINCT track_id) ;
SELECT A.name, SUM(P.track_id) FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id=P.artist_id GROUP BY P.artist_id HAVING SUM(P.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY SUM(P.track_id) DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT name, COUNT(Track.track_id)  FROM Artist, Track GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(Track.track_id)>=3 ORDER BY COUNT(Track.track_id) DESC;
SELECT name, SUM(track_id) FROM Artist JOIN Performs ON Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY artist_id HAVING SUM(track.id) >= 3 ORDER BY SUM(track_id) DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT name, COUNT(track_id) as total FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND total >= 3 ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Artist.artist_id IN (SELECT artist_id WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id) >= 3) GROUP BY name ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist a WHERE artist_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT p.artist_id, track_id  FROM Performs p ) HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT Artist.name, COUNT(Performs.track_id)  FROM Track, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id=Performs.artist_id HAVING COUNT(Performs.track_id) >= 3  ORDER BY COUNT(Performs.track_id) DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) as distinct_tracks FROM Artist a JOIN Performs p ON(a.artist_id = p.artist_id) GROUP BY artist_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) >2  ORDER BY distinct_tracks;
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(*)  FROM Artist, Performs  WHERE Track.track_id = Performs.track_id GROUP BY Artist.id  HAVING COUNT(Tracks.id) >= 3 ORDER BY DESC;
SELECT name COUNT(name) FROM Track,Artist,Performs WHERE Track.track_id = Perform.track_id AND Perform.artist_id = Artist.artist_id GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(name) >=3 ORDER BY COUNT(name)

SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.track_id) FROM Artist a, Performs p, Track t WHERE a.artist_id=p.artist_id AND p.track_id=t.track_id GROUP BY name, p.track_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.track_id)>=3 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT p.track_id) DESC;
SELECT name, COUNT(Performs.track_id) AS tracks_played FROM Artist NATURAL JOIN Performs WHERE COUNT(Performs.track_id) >= 3 GROUP BY name ORDER BY tracks_played DESC;
SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(*) FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id  GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(*) AS tracks_they_played FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.artist_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY tracks_they_played DESC;

SELECT A.name, COUNT(T.track_id) FROM Artist A, Performs P, Track T WHERE P.artist_id = A.artist_id AND P.track_id = T.track_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(T.track_id) > 2 ORDER BY COUNT(T.track_id) DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT name, COUNT(song) AS numberOfSongs FROM Track, Artist, Performs WHERE Artist.artist_id=Performs.artist_id AND Track.track_id=Perfroms.track_id GROUP BY name HAVING numberOfSongs>=3 ORDER BY numberOfSongs DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) AS stats FROM Artist A JOIN Performs P ON A.artist_id = P.artist_id WHERE COUNT(DISTINCT P.track_id) >= 3 GROUP BY A.name ORDER BY stats DESC;
SELECT Artist.name, SUM(Performs.track_id) FROM Artist NATURAL JOIN Performs GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING count(Performs.track_id) > 2 DESC;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT (DISTINCT Performs.track_id) FROM Artist, Performs  WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT (DISTINCT Performs.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT (DISTINCT Performs.track_id) DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(P.track_id) AS count  FROM Artist A, Track T, Performs P  WHERE A.aritst_id=P.artist_id AND T.track_id=P.track_id  GROUP BY A.name  HAVING count >=3  ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Performs.track_id) AS artist_track_count FROM Artist, Performs WHERE Performs.artist_id = Artist.artist_id GROUP BY Artist.artist_id HAVING artist_track_count >= 3 ORDER BY artist_track_count DESC;
SELECT A.name, COUNT(P.track_id) FROM Artist A, Performs P WHERE A.artist_id = P.artist_id GROUP BY A.name HAVING COUNT(P.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY COUNT(P.track_id) DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT A.name, COUNT(*) >= 3 FROM Artist A WHERE EXISTS (SELECT DISTINCT P.track_id FROM Performs P WHERE A.artist_id=P.artist_id) GROUP BY A.artist_id;
SELECT name, COUNT DISTINCT(track_id)  FROM Artist, Performs  WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id  GROUP BY name  HAVING COUNT DISTINCT(track_id) >= 3  ORDER BY DESC;

SELECT Artist.name, COUNT(DISTINCT Track.track_id) AS num_tracks FROM Artist, Performs, Track WHERE Artist.artist_id = Performs.artist_id AND Performs.track_id = Track.track_id GROUP BY Artist.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Track.track_id) >= 3 ORDER BY DESC;
